behaviors.description: Returns correct sum for two positive integers
behaviors.justification: A unit test can call the function directly and assert the return value without any external dependencies.
behaviors.test_description: Call add(2, 3) and assert it returns 5. No mocks or infrastructure needed.

behaviors.description: Saves result to database after computation
behaviors.justification: A unit test with a mocked DB would not catch actual persistence failures. The real DB driver interaction must be tested.
behaviors.test_description: Spin up a real test database, call the function, then query the DB to verify the row was written.

behaviors.justification: Can mock the email sender and verify the mock was called.
behaviors.test_description: Mock the email service and assert it was called with the right arguments.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Actually needs Integration level — the SMTP handshake can fail in ways a mock won't catch.
